products.name: Classic Solitaire Engagement Ring
products.description: A timeless solitaire engagement ring featuring a brilliant-cut diamond set in 18k white gold. Ethically sourced center stone with exceptional clarity and fire.
products.shortDescription: Brilliant solitaire in 18k white gold with ethically sourced diamond.

products.name: Diamond Marquise Angel Cluster Ring
products.description: Our diamond marquise angel cluster ring radiates brilliance, combining elegant marquise stones in a heavenly design of timeless sophistication.
products.shortDescription: Elegant marquise cluster design radiating heavenly brilliance.

products.name: Vintage Halo Engagement Ring
products.description: A romantic vintage-inspired halo ring with a cushion-cut center diamond surrounded by a delicate pavé band in rose gold.
products.shortDescription: Vintage halo design with cushion-cut center stone.

products.name: Sapphire Pendant Necklace
products.description: An elegant sapphire pendant suspended from a delicate 18k gold chain. Handcrafted with exceptional gemstones for refined everyday luxury.
products.shortDescription: Sapphire pendant on delicate 18k gold chain.

products.name: Diamond Tennis Necklace
products.description: A stunning line of graduated diamonds set in platinum, creating a continuous river of light around the neckline.
products.shortDescription: Graduated diamond line necklace in platinum.

products.name: Gold Bangle Bracelet
products.description: A sleek 18k gold bangle with a polished finish, offering timeless elegance and comfortable everyday wear.
products.shortDescription: Polished 18k gold bangle for everyday elegance.

products.name: Diamond Tennis Bracelet
products.description: A classic tennis bracelet featuring brilliant-cut diamonds in a secure four-prong setting, crafted for lasting beauty.

products.name: Diamond Brooch
products.description: Our diamond brooch showcases exquisite craftsmanship, featuring radiant stones set in refined metalwork, embodying timeless elegance and distinguished sophistication.
products.shortDescription: Radiant diamond brooch with refined metalwork.

products.name: Three-Stone Engagement Ring
products.description: Symbolizing past, present, and future — three brilliant diamonds set in a classic prong setting on a tapered band.
products.shortDescription: Three brilliant diamonds symbolizing past, present, and future.

products.name: Custom Emerald Cut Ring
products.description: A bespoke emerald-cut diamond ring with tapered baguette side stones, crafted to your exact specifications.
products.shortDescription: Bespoke emerald-cut design with baguette accents.

products.name: Custom Art Deco Ring
products.description: An Art Deco inspired custom ring with geometric diamond patterns and milgrain detailing in white gold.
products.shortDescription: Art Deco inspired geometric design with milgrain detail.

products.name: Custom Rose Gold Band
products.description: A custom hand-forged rose gold band with a unique hammered texture, perfect as a wedding band or stackable piece.
products.shortDescription: Hand-forged rose gold with unique hammered texture.
